column4: A glass dome rises from the ocean floor. Air fills it impossibly. Coral grows on ancient architecture.
Underwater market stalls preserved in stasis. Goods from a civilization that mastered the sea.
column13: A grand plaza with a fountain that flows upward. Bioluminescent fish swim through the air.
column22: A temple of blue marble. Tridents line the walls. The god's throne is empty but warm.

column4: Crystal tablets containing all Atlantean knowledge. The language shifts to be readable.
column13: The engine that keeps the dome intact. It's failing. Slowly. Centuries left, but still.
column19:
,6106|Atlantis — Royal Palace|forgotten_epoch|Opulent halls of pearl and gold. The last king left a note: 'We chose to sink.'||||||,,
,6107
column22: The jungle parts to reveal golden light. A city of gold, hidden for millennia.
column31: Gates of solid gold, twenty feet tall. They open at a touch. No one has touched them in ages.
column37:
,6109|El Dorado — Main Avenue|forgotten_epoch|A street paved with gold. Buildings of gold. Even the trees have golden leaves. It's blinding.||||||,6110|El Dorado — Temple|forgotten_epoch|The central temple. Gold and jade. The altar holds a single emerald the size of a head.||||||,,
,6111
column40: If the city is gold, this is platinum. The wealth of an empire concentrated in one room.
column46:
,6112|El Dorado — Sacrifice Pit|forgotten_epoch|A pit where offerings were made. Gold statues of the sacrificed line the edges. Their faces are peaceful.||||||,6113|Lemuria — Crystal Spire|forgotten_epoch|A tower of living crystal that grows from the earth. Lemurian technology — organic and alive.||||||,6114|Lemuria — Thought Gardens|forgotten_epoch|Plants that grow from ideas. Think of something and it blooms. Be careful what you think.||||||,,
,,6115|Lemuria — Harmony Chamber|forgotten_epoch|A room that resonates with your life force. Stand here and hear the music of your soul.|safe|||||,6116
column49: Every event that ever happened, recorded in crystal. Past, present, and future. All accessible.
column55:
,6117|Lemuria — Ascension Point|forgotten_epoch|Where the Lemurians transcended physical form. The air shimmers with their residual presence.||||||,,
,,6118|Shangri-La — Valley|forgotten_epoch|A hidden valley of eternal spring. People here don't age. They've been waiting for visitors.||||||,6119|Shangri-La — Monastery|forgotten_epoch|A peaceful monastery where masters teach the secrets of immortality. The price is staying forever.|safe|||||,6120
column58: The highest point of the hidden valley. From here, you can see all of time laid out like a map.
